scripts.compile-example:file-vault: sh -c 'for svc in identity-svc metadata-svc storage-svc sharing-svc notifications-svc audit-svc processing-svc search-svc assistant-svc frontend docs; do tsp compile examples/file-vault/services/$svc || exit $?; done'
scripts.compile-example:game-platform: sh -c 'for svc in backend frontend docs; do tsp compile examples/game-platform/services/$svc || exit $?; done'
scripts.compile-examples: pnpm run clean:examples && pnpm run compile-example:file-vault && pnpm run compile-example:game-platform && pnpm run format-examples
scripts.format-examples: pnpm run format-examples:ent && pnpm run format-examples:sqlmodel && pnpm run format-examples:zod
scripts.validate-examples:ent: sh -c 'set -e; for d in outputs/file-vault/*/ent outputs/game-platform/*/ent; do test -d "$d" || continue; (cd "$d" && go build -mod=mod ./...); done'
scripts.validate-examples:sqlmodel: sh -c 'set -e; for d in outputs/file-vault/*/sqlmodel outputs/game-platform/*/sqlmodel; do test -d "$d" || continue; python -m compileall "$d"; done'
scripts.validate-examples:zod: sh -c 'set -e; for d in outputs/file-vault/frontend/zod outputs/game-platform/frontend/zod; do test -d "$d" || continue; pnpm --dir "$d" exec tsc -p tsconfig.json; done'
scripts.validate-examples:protobuf: sh -c 'set -e; for d in outputs/file-vault/*/protobuf outputs/game-platform/*/protobuf; do test -d "$d" || continue; protos="$(find "$d" -name "*.proto" | sort)"; test -n "$protos" || continue; protoc -I "$d" --descriptor_set_out=/tmp/$(basename $(dirname "$d")).pb $protos; done'
scripts.validate-examples: pnpm run validate-examples:ent && pnpm run validate-examples:sqlmodel && pnpm run validate-examples:zod && pnpm run validate-examples:dbml && pnpm run validate-examples:protobuf
